narrative:
27 Ohio Senate district has 255,034 registered voters, with 56.7% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 20.3% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 22.9%, a modest Democratic lean of 2.6 percentage points. Registration is trending bluer in younger age cohorts (1990s–2000s births lean +2.4% D−R vs -0.1% for 1950s–60s cohorts).
